summary: Completed frontend testing of THRESHOLD PWA. Public pages and authentication protection working correctly. Registration flow functional but onboarding completion has issues preventing access to authenticated features.

ui_bugs.issue: Multi-select questions cause navigation issues preventing completion of all 15 questions
After filling commitment form, flow resets instead of proceeding to dashboard

integration_issues.issue: Cannot complete full onboarding flow to access authenticated dashboard

passed_tests: Welcome page loads with correct dark theme and Begin Assessment button
Framing pages navigation works with continue and skip options
Assessment flow starts correctly with progress bar and question display
Registration flow creates mock account in localStorage
PWA manifest.json loads correctly with proper configuration
Authentication protection works - protected routes redirect unauthenticated users

success_percentage.frontend_protected: 0% (unable to test due to auth flow issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix onboarding completion flow: 1) Assessment multi-select question navigation issues preventing completion of all 15 questions, 2) Commitment page flow that resets instead of proceeding to dashboard after completion. These issues prevent testing of authenticated features like dashboard, check-in, plan pages, etc.
